feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Danger Force Season 1 Episode 7 ‘Chapa’s Crush’ Full Episode in HD

link.title: Danger Force Season 1 Episode 7 ‘Chapa’s Crush’ Full Episode in HD

entry.content: Captain Man and Danger Force have been incapacitated by a bag-wearing criminal who robs Nacho Ball. Despite her arms being free, Volt is unable to zap the criminal. At the Man’s Nest, Captain Man reprimands Danger Force for their screw up as Shout-Out, AWOL, and Brainstorm talk about why Volt has been acting weird. Schwoz secretly obtained a hair from Chapa’s brush and reveals that she has a crush on someone. Mika states that Chapa has been going to Hip Hop Puree for the last three days with the receipts being from a cashier named Creston Chestwell. To prove that he has friends, Ray goes to look for someone named Kunka who he claims is a friend. When Mika goes to Hip Hop Puree, she meets Creston and surprises Chapa. Miles and Bose also get attracted to Creston’s appearances. Mika states to Chapa that she can’t use her abilities if she is in “like-like” as they start to compete for his attention. When Captain Man finds an adult Kunka, he turns out to be the bag-wearing criminal Take-Out who starts to rob Nacho Ball. Because of this, Danger Force leaves stating to Creston that they’ll be back at 9:30. Danger Force arrives and defeats Take-Out. Later that night, Trent reports that Creston has moved to Neighborville much to the dismay of Danger Force. The Man’s Nest is suddenly visited by Henry Hart who asks when Schwoz had the time to build the Man’s Nest.
entry.summary: Captain Man and Danger Force have been incapacitated by a bag-wearing criminal who robs Nacho Ball. Despite her arms being free, Volt is unable to zap the criminal. At the Man’s Nest, Captain Man reprimands Danger Force for their screw up as Shout-Out, AWOL, and Brainstorm talk about why Volt has been acting weird. Schwoz secretly obtained a hair from Chapa’s brush and reveals that she has a crush on someone. Mika states that Chapa has been going to Hip Hop Puree for the last three days with the receipts being from a cashier named Creston Chestwell. To prove that he has friends, Ray goes to look for someone named Kunka who he claims is a friend. When Mika goes to Hip Hop Puree, she meets Creston and surprises Chapa. Miles and Bose also get attracted to Creston’s appearances. Mika states to Chapa that she can’t use her abilities if she is in “like-like” as they start to compete for his attention. When Captain Man finds an adult Kunka, he turns out to be the bag-wearing criminal Take-Out who starts to rob Nacho Ball. Because of this, Danger Force leaves stating to Creston that they’ll be back at 9:30. Danger Force arrives and defeats Take-Out. Later that night, Trent reports that Creston has moved to Neighborville much to the dismay of Danger Force. The Man’s Nest is suddenly visited by Henry Hart who asks when Schwoz had the time to build the Man’s Nest.

entry.title: ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಯಿಂದ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿರುವ Minister Oneindia Kannada

link.title: ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಯಿಂದ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿರುವ Minister Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಮಾನ್ಯ ಗ್ರಾಮೀಣಾಭಿವೃದ್ಧಿ ಮತ್ತು ಪಂಚಾಯತ್ ರಾಜ್ ಸಚಿವರಾದ
ಶ್ರೀ ಕೆ.ಎಸ್.ಈಶ್ವರಪ್ಪ ರವರು.
ಇಂದು ಮಣಿಪಾಲ್ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ತಮ್ಮಕಚೇರಿ ಕೆಲಸದ ಕಡತಗಳನ್ನು
ಪರಿಶೀಲಿಸಿದರು.
#KSEshwarappa #Coronavirus
Minister for Rural Development and Panchayat Raj Shri KS Eshwarappa.
Today their concert work files were being checked at Manipal Hospital
entry.summary: ಮಾನ್ಯ ಗ್ರಾಮೀಣಾಭಿವೃದ್ಧಿ ಮತ್ತು ಪಂಚಾಯತ್ ರಾಜ್ ಸಚಿವರಾದ ಶ್ರೀ ಕೆ.ಎಸ್.ಈಶ್ವರಪ್ಪ ರವರು. ಇಂದು ಮಣಿಪಾಲ್ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ತಮ್ಮಕಚೇರಿ ಕೆಲಸದ ಕಡತಗಳನ್ನು ಪರಿಶೀಲಿಸಿದರು. #KSEshwarappa #Coronavirus Minister for Rural Development and Panchayat Raj Shri KS Eshwarappa. Today their concert work files were being checked at Manipal Hospital

entry.title: Brexit : Le Drian dénonce l’attitude « intransigeante et irréaliste » de Londres

link.title: Brexit : Le Drian dénonce l’attitude « intransigeante et irréaliste » de Londres

entry.content: Les négociations entre l’UE et le Royaume-Uni sur leur future relation après le Brexit sont bloquées, a estimé lundi, le ministre français des Affaires étrangères Jean-Yves Le Drian lors d’un discours devant les ambassadeurs de France en Europe. En cause : l’intransigeance et l’irréalisme de Londres, a-t-il dénoncé.
entry.summary: Les négociations entre l’UE et le Royaume-Uni sur leur future relation après le Brexit sont bloquées, a estimé lundi, le ministre français des Affaires étrangères Jean-Yves Le Drian lors d’un discours devant les ambassadeurs de France en Europe. En cause : l’intransigeance et l’irréalisme de Londres, a-t-il dénoncé.

entry.title: Varanasi News: बाढ़ की मार से परेशान नाविकों की नैया पार लगाएंगे Sonu Sood । वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Varanasi News: बाढ़ की मार से परेशान नाविकों की नैया पार लगाएंगे Sonu Sood । वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Sonu Sood, who led hundreds of people to his home in lockdown, has come forward this time to help the sailor families of Kashi. The sailors of Varanasi have been troubled since the sudden lockdown in March. Unlock started but lack of tourists did not lead to earning opportunity. People coming from Varanasi or nearby districts became the support of the sailors. Meanwhile, due to floods in the Ganges, the district administration once again stopped the operation till September 15. Since then, the livelihood of the sailors was severely affected.
कोरोना वायरस और लॉकडाउन के बीच गरीब, बेसहारा और जरूरतमंदों के मसीहा बने बॉलीवुड एक्टर सोनू सूद पिछले कुछ महीनों से सुर्खियों में बने हुए हैं। प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी के संसदीय क्षेत्र वाराणसी के नाविकों पर अब मुसीबत आई तो एक बार फिर सोनू सूद याद आए। जी हां लॉकडाउन के चलते गंगा नदी में नौकायन ठप रहा तो अब बाढ़ के चलते 15 सितंबर तक के लिए नाव संचालन पर रोक लगा दी गई है। ऐसे में काशी के 350 नाविक परिवारों के सामने पेट पालने का संकट खड़ा हो गया है। वाराणसी में लॉकडाउन और बाढ़ के चलते भुखमरी के कगार पर पहुंच चुके नाविकों की मदद के लिए सोनू सूद ने हाथ बढ़ाया है।
#SonuSood #lockdown #Varanasi
entry.summary: Sonu Sood, who led hundreds of people to his home in lockdown, has come forward this time to help the sailor families of Kashi. The sailors of Varanasi have been troubled since the sudden lockdown in March. Unlock started but lack of tourists did not lead to earning opportunity. People coming from Varanasi or nearby districts became the support of the sailors. Meanwhile, due to floods in the Ganges, the district administration once again stopped the operation till September 15. Since then, the livelihood of the sailors was severely affected. कोरोना वायरस और लॉकडाउन के बीच गरीब, बेसहारा और जरूरतमंदों के मसीहा बने बॉलीवुड एक्टर सोनू सूद पिछले कुछ महीनों से सुर्खियों में बने हुए हैं। प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी के संसदीय क्षेत्र वाराणसी के नाविकों पर अब मुसीबत आई तो एक बार फिर सोनू सूद याद आए। जी हां लॉकडाउन के चलते गंगा नदी में नौकायन ठप रहा तो अब बाढ़ के चलते 15 सितंबर तक के लिए नाव संचालन पर रोक लगा दी गई है। ऐसे में काशी के 350 नाविक परिवारों के सामने पेट पालने का संकट खड़ा हो गया है। वाराणसी में लॉकडाउन और बाढ़ के चलते भुखमरी के कगार पर पहुंच चुके नाविकों की मदद के लिए सोनू सूद ने हाथ बढ़ाया है। #SonuSood #lockdown #Varanasi

entry.title: Johor cops open 398 investigation papers on loan sharks

link.title: Johor cops open 398 investigation papers on loan sharks

entry.content:
Police have uncovered a major illegal money-lending syndicate that operates not only throughout the country but has links across the Causeway in their efforts to crack down on loan sharks.
Johor police chief Comm Datuk Ayob Khan Mydin Pitchay said within the first eight months of this year, state police had opened 398 investigation papers on ah long (loan shark) activities in Johor Baru.
Read more at
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: Police have uncovered a major illegal money-lending syndicate that operates not only throughout the country but has links across the Causeway in their efforts to crack down on loan sharks. Johor police chief Comm Datuk Ayob Khan Mydin Pitchay said within the first eight months of this year, state police had opened 398 investigation papers on ah long (loan shark) activities in Johor Baru. Read more at WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: Realtor.com Now Features Flood Risk Information

link.title: Realtor.com Now Features Flood Risk Information

entry.content:
Rising sea levels have created a flood risk that could have severe economic impacts.
Realtor.com is taking the flood risk guess work out of home buying.
The real estate website is including flood plain data on both for-sale and off-the-market listings.
According to Gizmodo, homes listed on the site will show a flood risk score between 1 and 10.
The site will prominently display the flood risk data directly below the property’s square footage and home information.
The flood factor score takes into account cumulative flood risk and projected environmental changes.
entry.summary: Rising sea levels have created a flood risk that could have severe economic impacts. Realtor.com is taking the flood risk guess work out of home buying. The real estate website is including flood plain data on both for-sale and off-the-market listings. According to Gizmodo, homes listed on the site will show a flood risk score between 1 and 10. The site will prominently display the flood risk data directly below the property’s square footage and home information. The flood factor score takes into account cumulative flood risk and projected environmental changes.

entry.title: Budak 46 dah lama pasang angan-angan nak jadi artis, tak sangka makin famous

link.title: Budak 46 dah lama pasang angan-angan nak jadi artis, tak sangka makin famous

entry.content: Akhirnya impian Budak 46 atau nama sebenar Ammar nak jadi orang terkenal dah tercapai. Walaupun dah pakai phone canggih tapi Ammar janji akan tetap buat slow-mo secara manual tau! Jom kita kenal-kenal dengan Budak 46 ni…
entry.summary: Akhirnya impian Budak 46 atau nama sebenar Ammar nak jadi orang terkenal dah tercapai. Walaupun dah pakai phone canggih tapi Ammar janji akan tetap buat slow-mo secara manual tau! Jom kita kenal-kenal dengan Budak 46 ni…

entry.title: Tình Người Kiếp Rắn Phần 3 Tập 85 - THVL1 Lồng Tiếng - Phim Ấn Độ

link.title: Tình Người Kiếp Rắn Phần 3 Tập 85 - THVL1 Lồng Tiếng - Phim Ấn Độ

entry.content: Xem phim Ấn Độ Tình Người kiếp rắn phần 3 tập 85 thvl1, Tinh nguoi kiep ran phan 3 tap 85
entry.summary: Xem phim Ấn Độ Tình Người kiếp rắn phần 3 tập 85 thvl1, Tinh nguoi kiep ran phan 3 tap 85

entry.title: New York’ta metroda tecavüz girişimi

link.title: New York’ta metroda tecavüz girişimi

entry.content:
ABD’nin New York kentindeki metro istasyonunda bir kişi, 25 yaşındaki bir kadına tecavüz girişiminde bulundu. New York polisi video ve fotoğraflarını yayınladığı zanlıyı kısa sürede yakaladı.
Tecavüzün en çok yaşandığı ülkeler arasında üst sıralarda yer alan ABD’de korkunç bir olay daha kayda geçti. New York kentinin Manhattan bölgesinde bir metroda geçtiğimiz Cumartesi günü yerel saatle 11.00 sıralarında bir kişi, metroya binmeyi bekleyen bir kadına tecavüz girişiminde bulundu. Kadına saldıran adama istasyonda bulunan diğer yolcular müdahale etti. O anlar olay yerinde bulunan vatandaşlar tarafından saniye saniye kaydedildi. Zanlı ise kısa süre sonra kaçarak kayıplara karıştı.
entry.summary: ABD’nin New York kentindeki metro istasyonunda bir kişi, 25 yaşındaki bir kadına tecavüz girişiminde bulundu. New York polisi video ve fotoğraflarını yayınladığı zanlıyı kısa sürede yakaladı. Tecavüzün en çok yaşandığı ülkeler arasında üst sıralarda yer alan ABD’de korkunç bir olay daha kayda geçti. New York kentinin Manhattan bölgesinde bir metroda geçtiğimiz Cumartesi günü yerel saatle 11.00 sıralarında bir kişi, metroya binmeyi bekleyen bir kadına tecavüz girişiminde bulundu. Kadına saldıran adama istasyonda bulunan diğer yolcular müdahale etti. O anlar olay yerinde bulunan vatandaşlar tarafından saniye saniye kaydedildi. Zanlı ise kısa süre sonra kaçarak kayıplara karıştı.

entry.title: Aashram (TV Series 2020) Part -1

link.title: Aashram (TV Series 2020) Part -1

entry.content:
Directed by Prakash Jha
Key Cast: Bobby Deol, Aaditi Pohankar, Chandan Roy Sanyal, Darshan Kumaar, Anupria Goenka, Adhyayan Summan, Tridha Choudhury, Vikram Kochhar, Tushar Pandey, Sachin Shroff, Anuritta Jha, Rajeev Siddhartha, Parinitaa Seth, Tanmaay Ranjan, Preeti Sood, Jahangir Khan, Kanupriya Gupta and Navdeep Tomar
About Aashram:
Based in the fictional city of Kashipur, is an empire created by a self proclaimed Godman - Kashipur waale Baba Nirala, who derives his power from the influence he has over the lower strata of the society. He has often stood for them and they consider him to be their Messiah! A lower caste girl Pammi, is drawn into his devotion as he comes to her rescue.
The sudden resurfacing of a skeleton in the adjacent forest land, disrupts the peace of the city in the crucial times of the upcoming state elections and all the links of the investigation mysteriously point towards one place - THE AASHRAM.
Doubts begin to float about Baba Nirala truly being a Messiah!
#PrakashJha #BobbyDeol #AaditiPohankar #ChandanRoySanyal #DarshanKumaar #AnupriaGoenka #AdhyayanSumman #TridhaChoudhury #VikramKochhar #TusharPandey #SachinShroff #AnurittaJha #RajeevSiddhartha #ParinitaaSeth #TanmaayRanjan #PreetiSood #JahangirKhan #KanupriyaGupta #NavdeepTomar
entry.summary: Directed by Prakash Jha Key Cast: Bobby Deol, Aaditi Pohankar, Chandan Roy Sanyal, Darshan Kumaar, Anupria Goenka, Adhyayan Summan, Tridha Choudhury, Vikram Kochhar, Tushar Pandey, Sachin Shroff, Anuritta Jha, Rajeev Siddhartha, Parinitaa Seth, Tanmaay Ranjan, Preeti Sood, Jahangir Khan, Kanupriya Gupta and Navdeep Tomar About Aashram: Based in the fictional city of Kashipur, is an empire created by a self proclaimed Godman - Kashipur waale Baba Nirala, who derives his power from the influence he has over the lower strata of the society. He has often stood for them and they consider him to be their Messiah! A lower caste girl Pammi, is drawn into his devotion as he comes to her rescue. The sudden resurfacing of a skeleton in the adjacent forest land, disrupts the peace of the city in the crucial times of the upcoming state elections and all the links of the investigation mysteriously point towards one place - THE AASHRAM. Doubts begin to float about Baba Nirala truly being a Messiah! #PrakashJha #BobbyDeol #AaditiPohankar #ChandanRoySanyal #DarshanKumaar #AnupriaGoenka #AdhyayanSumman #TridhaChoudhury #VikramKochhar #TusharPandey #SachinShroff #AnurittaJha #RajeevSiddhartha #ParinitaaSeth #TanmaayRanjan #PreetiSood #JahangirKhan #KanupriyaGupta #NavdeepTomar

entry.title: Los Angeles ‘Man in Jetpack’ shocks pilots FBI investigates Oneindia News

link.title: Los Angeles ‘Man in Jetpack’ shocks pilots FBI investigates Oneindia News

entry.content:
Is it a bird, is it a plane? No, it’s a man in a jetpack! But what was he doing near the Los Angeles LAX Airport nearby where planes were landing? No one knows and the FBI is investigating. The man was hovering at about 3,000 feet about 300 yards away from the airplanes. The mystery jetpack man has shocked LA.
#ManInJetpack #LAXairport #JetpackMystery
entry.summary: Is it a bird, is it a plane? No, it’s a man in a jetpack! But what was he doing near the Los Angeles LAX Airport nearby where planes were landing? No one knows and the FBI is investigating. The man was hovering at about 3,000 feet about 300 yards away from the airplanes. The mystery jetpack man has shocked LA. #ManInJetpack #LAXairport #JetpackMystery

entry.title: Tum Ho Wajah Episode 18 Promo HUM TV Drama

link.title: Tum Ho Wajah Episode 18 Promo HUM TV Drama

entry.content:
Tum Ho Wajah, Episode 18 Promo, Official HD Video - 28 August 2020
Tum Ho Wajah is a story of lust, lies, deceit and karma. Penned by Samina Ejaz and directed by Samia Waseem, the drama serial is an intertwined story of Mansoor Ahmed, Ghafoor and Mansoor’s younger brother Murad Ahmed’s families. Mansoor Ahmed’s wife Sahiba, daughters Chanda and Sitara and sons Zain and Babar are a closed knit, typical happy middle-class family. Things seem to be working for the family until Chanda makes a terrible mistake that not only shatters everyone but opens up the family to a bizarre web of lies and deceit by people with sinister plans and personal grudges. The serial has a stellar cast comprising the industry’s finest artists Sawera Nadeem, Shahood Alvi, Sumbul Iqbal, Shehzad Sheikh, Saboor Aly, Ali Abbas, Raza Talish, Kashif Mehmood, Salma Hassan, Noor Ul Hassan, Shehzeen Rahat and others.
Starring:
Sawera Nadeem, Shahood Alvi, Sumbul Iqbal, Shehzad Sheikh, Saboor Aly, Ali Abbas, Raza Talish, Kashif Mehmood, Salma Hassan, Noor Ul Hassan, Shehzeen Rahat & Others.
Directed By: Saima Waseem
Written By: Samina Ejaz
Produced By: Dramebaaz & MD Production
#TumHoWajah #SaweraNadeem #ShehzadSheikh #ShahoodAlvi #SumbulIqbal #SaboorAly
entry.summary: Tum Ho Wajah, Episode 18 Promo, Official HD Video - 28 August 2020 Tum Ho Wajah is a story of lust, lies, deceit and karma. Penned by Samina Ejaz and directed by Samia Waseem, the drama serial is an intertwined story of Mansoor Ahmed, Ghafoor and Mansoor’s younger brother Murad Ahmed’s families. Mansoor Ahmed’s wife Sahiba, daughters Chanda and Sitara and sons Zain and Babar are a closed knit, typical happy middle-class family. Things seem to be working for the family until Chanda makes a terrible mistake that not only shatters everyone but opens up the family to a bizarre web of lies and deceit by people with sinister plans and personal grudges. The serial has a stellar cast comprising the industry’s finest artists Sawera Nadeem, Shahood Alvi, Sumbul Iqbal, Shehzad Sheikh, Saboor Aly, Ali Abbas, Raza Talish, Kashif Mehmood, Salma Hassan, Noor Ul Hassan, Shehzeen Rahat and others. Starring: Sawera Nadeem, Shahood Alvi, Sumbul Iqbal, Shehzad Sheikh, Saboor Aly, Ali Abbas, Raza Talish, Kashif Mehmood, Salma Hassan, Noor Ul Hassan, Shehzeen Rahat & Others. Directed By: Saima Waseem Written By: Samina Ejaz Produced By: Dramebaaz & MD Production #TumHoWajah #SaweraNadeem #ShehzadSheikh #ShahoodAlvi #SumbulIqbal #SaboorAly

entry.title: India Flood Update: Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat और Odisha में बाढ़ से भारी तबाही वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: India Flood Update: Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat और Odisha में बाढ़ से भारी तबाही वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Due to continuous heavy rains, many parts of the country are in the grip of floods. Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat, there has been a lot of destruction. At the same time, Odisha and Bihar are also suffering from floods. The floods and rains in Madhya Pradesh and Gujarat are so devastating that the situation is starting to become uncontrollable. The flood crisis has become serious due to the rise of many rivers. The Narmada River is flowing above the danger mark.
लगातार हो रही भारी बारिश के चलते देश के कई हिस्से बाढ़ की चपेट में है. मध्य प्रदेश, गुजरात, में भारी तबाही मची है. वहीं, ओडिशा और बिहार भी बाढ़ से बेहाल हैं. मध्य प्रदेश और गुजरात में में बाढ़ और बारिश का कहर इस कदर बरपा है कि हालात बेकाबू होने लगे हैं. कई नदियां उफान पर होने से बाढ़ का संकट गंभीर हो गया है. नर्मदा नदी खतरे के निशान से ऊपर बह रही है
#IndiaFlood #FloodInMP #FloodInGujarat
entry.summary: Due to continuous heavy rains, many parts of the country are in the grip of floods. Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat, there has been a lot of destruction. At the same time, Odisha and Bihar are also suffering from floods. The floods and rains in Madhya Pradesh and Gujarat are so devastating that the situation is starting to become uncontrollable. The flood crisis has become serious due to the rise of many rivers. The Narmada River is flowing above the danger mark. लगातार हो रही भारी बारिश के चलते देश के कई हिस्से बाढ़ की चपेट में है. मध्य प्रदेश, गुजरात, में भारी तबाही मची है. वहीं, ओडिशा और बिहार भी बाढ़ से बेहाल हैं. मध्य प्रदेश और गुजरात में में बाढ़ और बारिश का कहर इस कदर बरपा है कि हालात बेकाबू होने लगे हैं. कई नदियां उफान पर होने से बाढ़ का संकट गंभीर हो गया है. नर्मदा नदी खतरे के निशान से ऊपर बह रही है #IndiaFlood #FloodInMP #FloodInGujarat

entry.title: Katy Perry assume son corps post-partum avec une photo en sous-vêtements

link.title: Katy Perry assume son corps post-partum avec une photo en sous-vêtements

entry.content:
Katy Perry assume son corps post-partum
avec une photo en sous-vêtements.
Katy Perry partage avec le monde entier
les dessous de sa nouvelle vie de maman ! .
La chanteuse américaine a dévoilé lundi 31 août son corps post-partum, après avoir donné la vie à sa petite Daisy. .
La compagne d’Orlando Bloom s’est prise en photo
en sous-vêtements dans un miroir, avec son soutien-gorge d’allaitement beige et sa culotte grise.
Un clin d’oeil à la cérémonie des MTV Video Music Awards 2020, à New York à laquelle elle n’a pu assister.
C’est dans la nuit du 25 au 26 août que le couple
a annoncé sur le compte Instagram de l’Unicef 
la naissance de leur premier enfant. .
La chanteuse, qui avait annoncé être enceinte d’une fille,
a donné naissance à une petite Daisy Dove Bloom.
Nous flottons avec amour
et émerveillement de l’arrivée saine et sûre de notre fille, Katy Perry et Orlando Bloom à l’Unicef
entry.summary: Katy Perry assume son corps post-partum avec une photo en sous-vêtements. Katy Perry partage avec le monde entier les dessous de sa nouvelle vie de maman ! . La chanteuse américaine a dévoilé lundi 31 août son corps post-partum, après avoir donné la vie à sa petite Daisy. . La compagne d’Orlando Bloom s’est prise en photo en sous-vêtements dans un miroir, avec son soutien-gorge d’allaitement beige et sa culotte grise. Un clin d’oeil à la cérémonie des MTV Video Music Awards 2020, à New York à laquelle elle n’a pu assister. C’est dans la nuit du 25 au 26 août que le couple a annoncé sur le compte Instagram de l’Unicef la naissance de leur premier enfant. . La chanteuse, qui avait annoncé être enceinte d’une fille, a donné naissance à une petite Daisy Dove Bloom. Nous flottons avec amour et émerveillement de l’arrivée saine et sûre de notre fille, Katy Perry et Orlando Bloom à l’Unicef

entry.title: Sahara Group का एक और बड़ा फ्रॉड,4 करोड़ लोगों के 86,000 करोड़ रुपये खतरे में वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sahara Group का एक और बड़ा फ्रॉड,4 करोड़ लोगों के 86,000 करोड़ रुपये खतरे में वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Another fraud case has surfaced in the Sahara company… between 2012 and 2014 when the Supreme Court found two Sahara Group companies guilty of fraudulent depositors and its head Subrata Roy was arrested. The group also started three new cooperative societies and recovered Rs 86,673 crore from about 4 crore depositors in its name. Now the Central Registrar of Co-operative Societies has asked the Ministry of Corporate Affairs to conduct an inquiry into the matter with the Serious Fraud Investigation Office in view of the serious apprehension that the general public is missing hard-earned money. Currently, new deposits have been banned in these four cooperative societies of Sahara.
सहारा कंपनी में एक और फ्राड का बड़ा मामला सामने आया है …2012 से 2014 के दौरान जब सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने सहारा ग्रुप की दो कंपनियों को जमाकर्ताओं के साथ धोखाधड़ी का दोषी पाया था और उसके प्रमुख सुब्रत रॉय की गिरफ्तारी हुई थी, उस समय भी ग्रुप ने तीन नई सहकारी समितियां शुरू कीं और उसके नाम पर करीब 4 करोड़ जमाकर्ताओं से 86,673 करोड़ रुपये वसूल लिए। अब सहकारी समितियों के केंद्रीय रजिस्ट्रार ने कॉर्पोरेट मामलों के मंत्रालय को इस मामले में आम जनता की गाढ़ी कमाई गायब होने की गंभीर आशंका के मद्देनजर सीरियस फ्रॉड इंवेस्टिगेशन ऑफिस से इसकी जांच कराने को कहा है। फिलहाल सहारा की इन चारों सहकारी समितियों में नई जमा पर रोक लगा दी गई है।
#SaharaGroup #AmbeValley
entry.summary: Another fraud case has surfaced in the Sahara company… between 2012 and 2014 when the Supreme Court found two Sahara Group companies guilty of fraudulent depositors and its head Subrata Roy was arrested. The group also started three new cooperative societies and recovered Rs 86,673 crore from about 4 crore depositors in its name. Now the Central Registrar of Co-operative Societies has asked the Ministry of Corporate Affairs to conduct an inquiry into the matter with the Serious Fraud Investigation Office in view of the serious apprehension that the general public is missing hard-earned money. Currently, new deposits have been banned in these four cooperative societies of Sahara. सहारा कंपनी में एक और फ्राड का बड़ा मामला सामने आया है …2012 से 2014 के दौरान जब सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने सहारा ग्रुप की दो कंपनियों को जमाकर्ताओं के साथ धोखाधड़ी का दोषी पाया था और उसके प्रमुख सुब्रत रॉय की गिरफ्तारी हुई थी, उस समय भी ग्रुप ने तीन नई सहकारी समितियां शुरू कीं और उसके नाम पर करीब 4 करोड़ जमाकर्ताओं से 86,673 करोड़ रुपये वसूल लिए। अब सहकारी समितियों के केंद्रीय रजिस्ट्रार ने कॉर्पोरेट मामलों के मंत्रालय को इस मामले में आम जनता की गाढ़ी कमाई गायब होने की गंभीर आशंका के मद्देनजर सीरियस फ्रॉड इंवेस्टिगेशन ऑफिस से इसकी जांच कराने को कहा है। फिलहाल सहारा की इन चारों सहकारी समितियों में नई जमा पर रोक लगा दी गई है। #SaharaGroup #AmbeValley

entry.title: Regardez la vidéo très émouvante de Marvel Studios qui rend hommage dans un film de près de 5 minutes à l’acteur Chadwick Boseman dont la disparition bouleverse les USA

link.title: Regardez la vidéo très émouvante de Marvel Studios qui rend hommage dans un film de près de 5 minutes à l’acteur Chadwick Boseman dont la disparition bouleverse les USA

entry.content:
Le message, partagé samedi 29 août, annonçant la mort de l’acteur américain est devenu, ce lundi 31 août, le plus « liké » de l’histoire de Twitter. Twitter a indiqué le record battu par ce tweet dans un communiqué : « Les fans se réunissent sur Twitter pour célébrer la vie de Chadwick Boseman, et le tweet envoyé depuis son compte hier soir est désormais le tweet le plus apprécié de tous les temps sur Twitter. »
Il avait incarné, au cours de sa brève carrière, quelques-unes des figures majeures du panthéon afro-américain – le joueur de base-ball Jackie Robinson, le musicien James Brown, le juriste Thurgood Marshall –, mais c’est en tant que roi d’un pays imaginaire que Chadwick Boseman a bouleversé la hiérarchie des représentations à Hollywood. Le personnage de T’Challa, souverain du royaume africain du Wakanda, était devenu, grâce au succès planétaire de Black Panther, de Ryan Coogler, en 2018, une icône dans toutes les communautés de la diaspora africaine.
Actif sur les plateaux de tournage avec pas moins de huit longs-métrages depuis le diagnostic de sa maladie en 2016, Chadwick Boseman était aussi un américain impliqué dans la politique de son pays, en particulier aux côtés de Kamala Harris. «Mon ami et collègue Bison Chadwick Boseman était brillant, gentil, cultivé et humble» a déclaré la colistière de Joe Biden.
. «Chadwick est venu à la Maison Blanche pour travailler avec les enfants quand il interprétait Jackie Robinson, dans le film 42, rappelle l’ancien président des États-Unis Barack Obama. On pouvait dire tout de suite qu’il était béni. D’être jeune, doué et noir ; d’utiliser ce pouvoir pour leur donner des héros à admirer ; de le faire tout en souffrant - quel usage de ses années».
entry.summary: Le message, partagé samedi 29 août, annonçant la mort de l’acteur américain est devenu, ce lundi 31 août, le plus « liké » de l’histoire de Twitter. Twitter a indiqué le record battu par ce tweet dans un communiqué : « Les fans se réunissent sur Twitter pour célébrer la vie de Chadwick Boseman, et le tweet envoyé depuis son compte hier soir est désormais le tweet le plus apprécié de tous les temps sur Twitter. » Il avait incarné, au cours de sa brève carrière, quelques-unes des figures majeures du panthéon afro-américain – le joueur de base-ball Jackie Robinson, le musicien James Brown, le juriste Thurgood Marshall –, mais c’est en tant que roi d’un pays imaginaire que Chadwick Boseman a bouleversé la hiérarchie des représentations à Hollywood. Le personnage de T’Challa, souverain du royaume africain du Wakanda, était devenu, grâce au succès planétaire de Black Panther, de Ryan Coogler, en 2018, une icône dans toutes les communautés de la diaspora africaine. Actif sur les plateaux de tournage avec pas moins de huit longs-métrages depuis le diagnostic de sa maladie en 2016, Chadwick Boseman était aussi un américain impliqué dans la politique de son pays, en particulier aux côtés de Kamala Harris. «Mon ami et collègue Bison Chadwick Boseman était brillant, gentil, cultivé et humble» a déclaré la colistière de Joe Biden. . «Chadwick est venu à la Maison Blanche pour travailler avec les enfants quand il interprétait Jackie Robinson, dans le film 42, rappelle l’ancien président des États-Unis Barack Obama. On pouvait dire tout de suite qu’il était béni. D’être jeune, doué et noir ; d’utiliser ce pouvoir pour leur donner des héros à admirer ; de le faire tout en souffrant - quel usage de ses années».

entry.title: Les Reines du shopping : ce duo belge mère-fille est déçu par leur ‘shopping parisien’

link.title: Les Reines du shopping : ce duo belge mère-fille est déçu par leur ‘shopping parisien’

entry.content:

Les Reines du shopping : ce duo belge mère-fille est déçu par leur ‘shopping parisien’
Les Reines du shopping : ce duo belge mère-fille est déçu par leur 'shopping parisien'
entry.summary: Les Reines du shopping : ce duo belge mère-fille est déçu par leur ‘shopping parisien’ Les Reines du shopping : ce duo belge mère-fille est déçu par leur ‘shopping parisien’ Les Reines du shopping : ce duo belge mère-fille est déçu par leur 'shopping parisien'

entry.title: Berkshire Hathaway Makes Big Investment In Five Japanese Firms

link.title: Berkshire Hathaway Makes Big Investment In Five Japanese Firms

entry.content:
Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway disclosed a $6 billion bet on five of Japan’s biggest trading companies.
The news was released Sunday night in a press release.
The billionaire investor’s company revealed that it owns just over 5% of Mitsubishi, Mitsui, Itochu, Marubeni, and Sumitomo.
Business Insider reports that all five firms rose between 4% and 10% on Monday.
Buffett said "I am delighted to have Berkshire Hathaway participate in the future of Japan and the five companies we have chosen for investment."
entry.summary: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway disclosed a $6 billion bet on five of Japan’s biggest trading companies. The news was released Sunday night in a press release. The billionaire investor’s company revealed that it owns just over 5% of Mitsubishi, Mitsui, Itochu, Marubeni, and Sumitomo. Business Insider reports that all five firms rose between 4% and 10% on Monday. Buffett said "I am delighted to have Berkshire Hathaway participate in the future of Japan and the five companies we have chosen for investment."

entry.title: Churails Episode 1, Season 1 Full Episode

link.title: Churails Episode 1, Season 1 Full Episode

entry.content:
Churails Episode 1, Season 1 Full Episode
Starting off, we finally got to see a series in Pakistan that is not the typical household storyline. The director is brilliant, the story is original and interesting, the acting could’ve been better but still pretty amazing. In short, a must-watch series.
#churails #pakistani #webseries #churailsepisode1 #pakistaniseason
entry.summary: Churails Episode 1, Season 1 Full Episode Starting off, we finally got to see a series in Pakistan that is not the typical household storyline. The director is brilliant, the story is original and interesting, the acting could’ve been better but still pretty amazing. In short, a must-watch series. #churails #pakistani #webseries #churailsepisode1 #pakistaniseason

entry.title: Paris-Hendaye : un interminable voyage pour les passagers du TGV 8538

link.title: Paris-Hendaye : un interminable voyage pour les passagers du TGV 8538

entry.content:
Une série d’incidents techniques a paralysé le réseau ferroviaire sud-ouest. Conséquence : un trajet de vingt-deux heures pour rejoindre Paris depuis Hendaye (Pyrénées-Atlantiques). 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Une série d’incidents techniques a paralysé le réseau ferroviaire sud-ouest. Conséquence : un trajet de vingt-deux heures pour rejoindre Paris depuis Hendaye (Pyrénées-Atlantiques). Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Tour de France 2020 - Caleb Ewan : ‘I’m so happy to get another win on the Tour de France’

link.title: Tour de France 2020 - Caleb Ewan : ‘I’m so happy to get another win on the Tour de France’

entry.content: Un sprint massif était attendu lors de la troisième étape du Tour de France à Sisteron et c’est l’Australien Caleb Ewan (Lotto-Soudal) qui s’est montré le plus fort. À terre samedi lors de la première étape et dernier dimanche, le petit sprinteur de la formation belge a su se ressaisir et a coiffé Sam Bennett (Deceuninck-Quick Step) dans les derniers mètres pour remporter son quatrième succès d’étape sur les routes de la Grande Boucle. L’occasion de redonner le sourire à une équipe Lotto Soudal qui a beaucoup souffert depuis le Grand Départ, Philippe Gilbert et John Degenkolb ayant quitté la course dès samedi soir.
entry.summary: Un sprint massif était attendu lors de la troisième étape du Tour de France à Sisteron et c’est l’Australien Caleb Ewan (Lotto-Soudal) qui s’est montré le plus fort. À terre samedi lors de la première étape et dernier dimanche, le petit sprinteur de la formation belge a su se ressaisir et a coiffé Sam Bennett (Deceuninck-Quick Step) dans les derniers mètres pour remporter son quatrième succès d’étape sur les routes de la Grande Boucle. L’occasion de redonner le sourire à une équipe Lotto Soudal qui a beaucoup souffert depuis le Grand Départ, Philippe Gilbert et John Degenkolb ayant quitté la course dès samedi soir.

entry.title: Kannada Film Industry Drug Abuse : Ragini Dwivedi से Crime Branch करेगी पूछताछ । वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Kannada Film Industry Drug Abuse : Ragini Dwivedi से Crime Branch करेगी पूछताछ । वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Kannada actress Ragini Dwivedi has been summoned by the Central Crime Branch (CCB) and she will appear before them today. The CCB has been investigating drug dealing and substance abuse by Sandalwood actors. The actress’ friend, Ravi, was arrested by the cops recently. When they enquired him, they got information about Ragini Dwivedi. Hence, the CCB has issued a notice to her asking her to join the investigation.
नारकोटिक्स कंट्रोल ब्यूरो ने कुछ दिनों पहले बेंगलुरु में एक बड़े ड्रग ट्रैफिकिंग रैकेट का भंडाफोड़ किया था. इस दौरान आरोपी से एक डायरी हासिल हुई थी जिसमें 15 बड़े नामचीन सितारों के नाम लिखे हुए थे । जिनपर शक की सुई गहरा रही हैं कि ये सभी ड्रग्स लेते हैं। अब इसी मामले के चलते साउथ एक्ट्रेस रागिनी द्विवेदी को क्राइम ब्रांच ने नोटिस भेजा है.
#Bengaluru #drugcase #RaginiDwivedi
entry.summary: Kannada actress Ragini Dwivedi has been summoned by the Central Crime Branch (CCB) and she will appear before them today. The CCB has been investigating drug dealing and substance abuse by Sandalwood actors. The actress’ friend, Ravi, was arrested by the cops recently. When they enquired him, they got information about Ragini Dwivedi. Hence, the CCB has issued a notice to her asking her to join the investigation. नारकोटिक्स कंट्रोल ब्यूरो ने कुछ दिनों पहले बेंगलुरु में एक बड़े ड्रग ट्रैफिकिंग रैकेट का भंडाफोड़ किया था. इस दौरान आरोपी से एक डायरी हासिल हुई थी जिसमें 15 बड़े नामचीन सितारों के नाम लिखे हुए थे । जिनपर शक की सुई गहरा रही हैं कि ये सभी ड्रग्स लेते हैं। अब इसी मामले के चलते साउथ एक्ट्रेस रागिनी द्विवेदी को क्राइम ब्रांच ने नोटिस भेजा है. #Bengaluru #drugcase #RaginiDwivedi

entry.title: Faute de place suffisante, des lycéens n’ont pas pu faire leur rentrée des classes

link.title: Faute de place suffisante, des lycéens n’ont pas pu faire leur rentrée des classes

entry.content:
Des centaines de lycéens se retrouvent sans affectation pour la rentrée. Un faible taux de redoublement en raison du confinement pourrait en être à l’origine. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: குறைந்தது 35 China வீர்ர்கள் உயிரிழந்திருக்கலாம்… வைரலாகும் புகைப்படம்

link.title: குறைந்தது 35 China வீர்ர்கள் உயிரிழந்திருக்கலாம்… வைரலாகும் புகைப்படம்

entry.content:
இந்திய வீரர்கள் உடனான மோதலில் குறைந்தது 35 China வீர்ர்கள் உயிரிழந்திருக்கலாம்… வைரலாகும் புகைப்படம்
Chinese casualties maybe more than india at galwan valley on june this year
entry.summary: இந்திய வீரர்கள் உடனான மோதலில் குறைந்தது 35 China வீர்ர்கள் உயிரிழந்திருக்கலாம்… வைரலாகும் புகைப்படம் Chinese casualties maybe more than india at galwan valley on june this year
